texto: When a man finds the woman he really loves, the one he respects and wants to call wife, there is nothing on earth he won't do for her. No mountain he won't hike. No river he won't wade. No door he won't open. She is Eve and there's not a snake crawling that can keep them apart.
explicacao: Citação de Yolanda Joe sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “When a man finds the woman he really loves, the one he respects and wants to call wife, there is …” articula amor, admiration, adoration em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como adoration e love.

frase_original: When a man finds the woman he really loves, the one he respects and wants to call wife, there is nothing on earth he won't do for her. No mountain he won't hike. No river he won't wade. No door he won't open. She is Eve and there's not a snake crawling that can keep them apart.
